required_contributions.description: Open specifications for trust, replay, and policy primitives.
required_contributions.user_outcome: Third parties can inspect and adopt the core trust/replay/policy contracts.

required_contributions.description: Reproducible datasets for incident replay and adversarial campaign evaluation.
required_contributions.user_outcome: Replay and adversarial evidence can be independently rerun from published datasets.

required_contributions.description: Reference proofs or proof sketches for key safety claims.
required_contributions.user_outcome: Safety claims are backed by explicit proof-oriented artifacts instead of prose-only assertions.

required_contributions.description: External red-team and academic-style evaluations with published methodology.
required_contributions.user_outcome: External reviewers can inspect methodology and reproduce the evaluation surface.

required_contributions.description: Public technical reports documenting failures, fixes, and frontier movement.
required_contributions.user_outcome: Scientific claims carry an auditable report trail that includes negative-result context.

output_contract_milestones.description: At least 4 publishable technical reports with reproducible artifact bundles.
output_contract_milestones.success_threshold: at least 4 publishable technical reports with reproducible artifact bundles

output_contract_milestones.description: At least 2 externally replicated high-impact claims.
output_contract_milestones.success_threshold: at least 2 externally replicated high-impact claims

output_contract_milestones.description: At least 1 open benchmark or verification tool adopted outside the project.
output_contract_milestones.success_threshold: at least 1 open benchmark or verification tool adopted outside the project

upstream_dependencies.reason: Scientific claims rely on the benchmark suite specification staying closed and reproducible.
PLAS benchmark evidence anchors policy-safety publication claims.
Verifier-pipeline closure keeps signature, transparency, and attestation claims externally checkable.
Third-party verifier tooling is required for independent replication.
Category-shift reporting underpins Section 16 report and replication narratives.
Adversarial campaign evidence is part of the scientific evaluation surface.
Node/Bun comparison methodology is part of the publishable scientific evidence base.

closure_rule.parent_epic_note: Closing bd-2501 advances Section 16, but bd-esst and broader section/master epics still track cross-section closure.

operator_verification: rch exec -- env RUSTUP_TOOLCHAIN=nightly CARGO_TARGET_DIR=$PWD/target_rch_scientific_contribution_targets_verify CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=1 CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 cargo test -p frankenengine-engine --test scientific_contribution_targets
